examples: Objective:To discuss the risk factors in gangrenous cholecystitis(GC).
The boy's left arm had been ripped off and was badly infected and gangrenous.
Then her hips and knees seized up; some of her toes became gangrenous and had to be amputated.
' When I amputate a limb, it's because it's gangrenous or doesn't work right.
She then received terrible news: her mother had developed gangrenous bed sores, and was seriously ill.
